summary_one_line: ICC header device-class field at offset 0x0c must equal a 4-byte class FOURCC ('abst'/link/namedcolor) instead of 'mntr'.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The 4-byte device-class signature field at input offsets 0x0c-0x0f must hold one of the class FOURCCs the branch tests ('abst' = cmsSigAbstractClass, or the sibling cmsSigLinkClass/cmsSigNamedColorClass literals). The loser-blocking inputs instead carry 'mntr' (cmsSigMonitorClass) at the same offsets, which fails all three equality comparisons.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: All five winner-resolving vpc seeds contain 'abst' at offset 0x0c-0x0f, exactly matching the cmsSigAbstractClass literal the blocker line compares devClass against; the W byte set at those offsets is concentrated on 61/62/73/74 ('abst').
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: All ten loser-blocking value_profile seeds carry 'mntr' at offset 0x0c-0x0f (W=a/b/s/t vs L=m/n/t/r), so devClass==cmsSigMonitorClass, which is not any of the three class signatures tested at line 197-199, so the true branch is never taken.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace: cmplog logs the runtime comparison devClass==cmsSigAbstractClass, captures the 4-byte constant 'abst', and the I2S mutator splices that exact literal into the input bytes at the offset where the failing operand was read, instantly satisfying the equality. value_profile (loser) lacks I2SRandReplace entirely, so it must stumble onto the 4-byte FOURCC by chance and cannot solve this exact-match magic-number gate within budget.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is an equality comparison of devClass against the cmsSigAbstractClass class signature.
The branch is one arm of a three-way class-signature equality chain (link / abstract / namedcolor).
Winner seeds carry the 'abst' FOURCC at offset 0x0c-0x0f while loser seeds carry 'mntr'.
A winner-resolving vpc seed contains the literal bytes 'abst' immediately after the profile preamble.
Loser-blocking value_profile seeds carry 'mntr' (monitor class) at the device-class offset.
The winner fuzzer has I2SRandReplace and the loser does not, which is the sole technique delta.
value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace and relies on CMP_MAP gradient buckets only.
Only value_profile_cmplog resolves the branch (9/10) while value_profile never does (0/10).

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2340 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed c60530ec495eaaed`; the chain has 15 levels and the tool reports 'I2S-floor signal: 1 ancestor dash row(s) at depth 14' (mutation_op = -, ParentInfo-only), the floor signal of an I2SRandReplace find under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness whose only gate is a 4-byte exact-equality CMP against a fixed FOURCC where value_profile resolves the branch as fast as value_profile_cmplog (no I2S advantage), showing CMP_MAP gradient alone suffices for this exact-match magic number.

weakest_evidence_point: The dash-row floor signal is a lower-bound proxy for I2SRandReplace rather than a logged literal mutator name, so the specific solving mutation is inferred, not directly recorded.
